basic_details.job_title: NMMC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 26 Medical Officer, Microbiologist Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Navi Mumbai Municipal Corporation (NMMC) has released the official Medical Officer, Microbiologist Recruitment 2026 on the official website of NMMC. A total of 26 vacancies have been announced under the NMMC Medical Officer, Microbiologist Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 70 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, MD Microbiology, Maharashtra Medical Council Registration
qualification.details: Medical Officer Full Time: MBBS with Maharashtra Medical Council Registration Medical Officer Part Time: MBBS with Maharashtra Medical Council Registration Microbiologist: MD Microbiology

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NMMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the NMMC Medical Officer / Microbiologist posts is scheduled for 07 July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What are the total number of vacancies announced by NMMC?
faq.answer: Navi Mumbai Municipal Corporation (NMMC) has announced a total of 26 vacancies for the posts of Medical Officer and Microbiologist.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer posts?
faq.answer: For the Medical Officer posts (Full Time and Part Time), candidates must possess an MBBS degree along with Maharashtra Medical Council Registration.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Microbiologist position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Microbiologist post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 75000.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the NMMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts is 70 years.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for NMMC recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these NMMC posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue for NMMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The specific venue address for the walk-in interview is not provided in the extracted data. Candidates should refer to the official notification for the exact location.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs. Specific documents like ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates (if applicable) are also required.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this NMMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for contractual positions, meaning the selected candidates will be appointed on a contract basis.
